zone_section_start.title_label_raw: CD-2: C&D MATERIALS PROCESSING FACILITIES ZONE

zone_section_end_before.title_label_raw: CD-3: C&D MATERIALS DISPOSAL SITES ZONE

zone_class_reference.summary: CD-2 is an established class of use zone.

permitted_uses.use_name: construction and demolition materials processing facilities

conditions: provided for the purposes of safety, security, or maintenance

prohibitions.summary: No development for any purpose other than one or more of the uses set out in subsection 62CA(1).
No land or building use in whole or in part for any purpose other than one or more of the uses set out in subsection 62CA(1).

incorporated_use_requirements.summary: Buildings erected, altered or used for CD-1 uses in a CD-2 Zone shall comply with the requirements of the CD-1 Zone.

controls.condition_text: Minimum lot area is 3,716 square metres (40,000 square feet) with central services and 11,148 square metres (120,000 square feet) with on-site services.
Minimum frontage is 15 metres (49.2 feet) with central services and 30 metres (98.4 feet) with on-site services.
Separation from the nearest residential dwelling or institutional use.

Where a building or structure is not to be located within 250 metres of a residential or institutional use or building, the building setback from any property line may be reduced to 10 metres (32.8 feet).

Where a C&D Materials Processing Facility is totally enclosed within a building with no outdoor storage of material, product, processing area, or equipment, the building setback from any property line may be reduced to 10 metres (32.8 feet).
The operation shall comply with the general zone requirements outlined in Section 62BB(3).

More than one C&D Materials operation is permitted on a site and each use is subject to applicable standards unless the uses are not clearly differentiated, in which case the more stringent requirements shall apply.

operational_controls.condition_text: C&D Materials Operations are subject to approval of a site plan for each use dealing with the matters outlined in Section 62BB(4).

spatial_features_needed.reason: Controls separation distances and 250 metre exception tests in 62CB(3).

open_issues.description: Subsections 62CA(2) and 62CA(3) refer to subsection (l) in the source; likely intended to mean subsection (1). Raw source wording was preserved in summaries.

Section 62CB(4)(b) contains source wording 'unless the uses are not clearly differentiated than the more stringent requirements shall apply'; wording should be checked against the PDF image before ingestion.
